sub: Upload a candidate resume and your target format.
Extract, review, and generate a client-ready CV.
hero.uploadHint: or drop it here · PDF, DOCX

converter.templateSubtitle: DOCX template or PDF reference sample
converter.convertHint: Upload a target format to continue

steps.title: Upload any resume
steps.body: PDF or DOCX — text-based files supported.

steps.title: Upload target format
steps.body: Use a DOCX template, or upload a PDF as a visual reference sample.

steps.title: Review and generate
steps.body: Compare the original preview with extracted fields, edit anything, then generate client-ready output.

showcase.heading: Any resume, your client-ready format.
showcase.sub: Extract into structured fields, preserve the original for review, and render through the controlled DOCX/PDF pipeline.

items.title: Original preserved. Recruiter approved.
items.body: Source content is preserved for comparison. Fields come from the original, gaps are flagged for you to fill, and missing facts are never invented.

items.title: Review before it ships
items.body: Side-by-side review shows the original resume preview next to the structured result. Click any field to edit before generation.

items.title: About 20 seconds
items.body: From upload to formatted output in roughly twenty seconds. No queue, no account required to get started.

footer.brandDesc: Reformat candidate resumes into recruiter-approved, client-ready CVs.

pricing.heading: Simple pricing
pricing.sub: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.

faq.q: What if the result has mistakes?
faq.a: You review and edit every field on the review screen before generation. Nothing ships until you say so.
TODO: Files are processed in memory and not permanently stored on our servers. Update with real data-retention policy before launch.
Yes — Pro is billed monthly with no lock-in. Cancel any time from your account settings.

review.pdfFallback: PDF preview not available in this browser.

errors.network: Could not reach the server — check your connection and try again.
errors.invalidFileType: Only PDF and DOCX files are supported.
